title: Suppress update banner when --json is in argv
description: Update-check banner prints to stderr during JSON output, breaking scripts that parse sweech usage --json. Promised JSON contract violated.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 1: "Update-check banner pollutes stderr during JSON output. Scripts parsing sweech usage --json break"

acceptanceCriteria: Banner skipped when --json is present anywhere in argv
Banner still shows for human-mode invocations (bare sweech, sweech list, etc.)
SWEECH_NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER=1 env var also suppresses it (for CI)
